message:
feat(types): Add sanitization audit logging configuration

Extends the sanitization configuration section with audit logging capabilities:

- Add `auditLog` boolean flag (default: false) to enable/disable audit logging
  of sanitization operations. When enabled, the system will log details about
  what content was sanitized, helping debug overly aggressive or insufficient
  sanitization rules.

- Add `auditLevel` enum option ("info" | "debug", default: "info") to control
  the verbosity of audit logs. "info" logs high-level sanitization events,
  while "debug" includes detailed pattern match information.

These additions support security compliance requirements where organizations
need to audit what sensitive data was detected and redacted from agent
sessions before storage or LLM processing.

Files changed:
- src/types.ts: Add auditLog and auditLevel fields to sanitization schema,
  with proper default values in the .default() specification
- src/config.ts: Add corresponding fields to DEFAULT_CONFIG object
